conversation.text: Hey Dad, remember that time you tried to fix the sink and ended up flooding the kitchen?

translations.Somali: Hey Aabe, ma xasuusataa markii aad isku dayday in aad saxdo saxanka oo aad qolka jikada biyo ku qoysay?

conversation.text: Oh, come on, that was ages ago. Besides, I did fix it eventually, didn't I?

translations.Somali: Oh, kaalay, taasi waa waqti hore. Waxaa intaa dheer, ugu dambayntii waan saxay, miyaan saxin?

conversation.text: Yeah, after Mom called the plumber. You were like, 'I got this', and then water was spraying everywhere like a fountain.

translations.Somali: Haa, ka dib markii hooyo ay wacday farsamayaqaanada biyaha. Adiguna waxaad tiri, 'Waxaan hayaa', ka dibna biyaha meel walba ayay ku firdheen sida ceel biyood.

conversation.text: I just underestimated the water pressure, that's all. It was a learning experience.

translations.Somali: Kaliya waxaan hoos u qiyaasay cadaadiska biyaha, taasna waa intaas. Waxay ahayd waayo-aragnimo waxbarasho.

conversation.text: A learning experience for you, a swimming lesson for the rest of us.

translations.Somali: Waayo-aragnimo waxbarasho adiga, cashar dabaasha inta kale ee naga mid ah.

conversation.text: Very funny. At least I try to fix things around here. What about the time you tried to assemble that bookshelf?

translations.Somali: Aad baad u qosol badan tahay. Ugu yaraan waxaan isku dayaa inaan wax hagaajiyo halkan. Maxaa ka dhigay wakhtigii aad isku dayday inaad isku xirto shelf-ka buugaagta?
